channel.name: Infusion Pump to HL7
channel.description: Reads infusion pump snapshots from the healthcare-v2 Infusion Pump Simulator REST API (via device_exporter) and transforms pump parameters to HL7 v2.5.1 ORU^R01 messages for hospital integration.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Parse infusion pump snapshot
Build HL7 ORU^R01 — Infusion Pump parameters
